title: The Voice of Bugle Ann
writer: Harvey Gates, Samuel Hoffenstein, MacKinlay Kantor
actors: Lionel Barrymore, Maureen O'Sullivan, Eric Linden
plot: The countrymen in the hills of Missouri take the hounds on night fox hunts. This goes on until Jacob Terry comes into the county and decides to raise sheep and install a woven wire fence. This upsets the neighbors since the dogs w...
